title: Specify slice fusion.yaml
description: Validates a slice's reconciliation index per RFC-27 §D4. `/spec:refine` writes one `fusion.yaml` per slice at `.specify/slices/<slice>/fusion.yaml`, listing every `REQ-*` id in `spec.md` and the `(source-key, claim-id)` pairs that contributed plus the authority outcome. The file is byte-stable across runs given the same inputs and is the operator's audit surface for synthesis decisions; it is regenerated whole on each `/spec:refine` and is not an authoritative input to any downstream verb (see RFC-27 §Reconciliation index). Closed top-level shape; closed per-requirement shape; closed per-contributing-claim shape — unknown fields are rejected. Drift between `spec.md` `REQ-*` ids and this file's `requirements[].id` is reported by `specify slice validate` as `slice-fusion-drift`.

version.description: Stored schema version. Currently `1`. Bumped only on a breaking shape change to `fusion.yaml`; additive fields land without a bump.

slice.description: Slice name. MUST match the directory name under `.specify/slices/<slice>/`.

generated-at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp at which `/spec:refine` wrote the file. Resolution is to the second (not nanosecond) so byte-stable diffs survive reasonably-fast clocks.

generator.description: CLI version that wrote the file (e.g. `specify@2.1.0`).

requirements.description: One entry per `REQ-*` id in `spec.md`. Order matches `spec.md` order; `specify slice validate` enforces id-set parity in both directions.

kebabName.description: Kebab-case identifier: lowercase letters and digits grouped by single internal hyphens; no leading, trailing, or consecutive hyphens.

reqId.description: Requirement id in the `REQ-NNN` form (three ASCII digits) per `crates/domain/src/spec/provenance.rs`.

claimKind.description: Closed claim-kind enum, mirrored from `evidence.schema.json#/$defs/claimKind`. Kept byte-identical so a fusion entry's `kind` value validates against the same closed set the source Evidence claim does.

requirementStatus.description: Mirrors the closed `RequirementStatus` enum in `crates/domain/src/spec/provenance.rs`. Per RFC-25 §Authority hierarchy: `agreed` (one source or single-value cross-source agreement), `unknown` (no contributing evidence), `conflict` (tied top-authority disagreement), `divergence` (authority-resolved disagreement; loser preserved as commentary).

fusionResolution.description: Closed resolution enum per RFC-27 §Reconciliation index. `single-source` — one contributing claim only. `single-value-agreement` — multiple contributors, identical value. `authority-resolved` — default authority ordering or per-Evidence override broke the tie. `per-slice-override` — per-slice `authority-override` map picked the winner. `unknown-no-evidence` — no contributing claims (paired with `requirementStatus: unknown`). `tied-conflict` — same-authority disagreement with no override (paired with `requirementStatus: conflict`).

source.description: Source key (matches a top-level `plan.yaml.sources.<key>` binding) the claim came from.

claim-id.description: Claim id within the source's Evidence file (matches `claims[].claim-id`).

kind.description: Claim kind copied from the source Evidence claim.

value.description: Optional single-line claim payload (the statement / criterion / decision body). Multi-line bodies are truncated to the first non-empty line with a trailing `…`; over-cap values truncate at a whitespace boundary and append `…`. The 16 KiB cap is enforced by the writer per RFC-27 §Reconciliation index. Full per-kind body fields stay in the source Evidence file (linked by `path`).

path.description: Optional `<path>#L<n>` anchor copied from the source Evidence claim so the operator can open the original line range.

winner.description: Optional. Present and `true` on the entry synthesis selected; present and `false` on entries dropped by authority resolution; absent on `agreed` blocks where there is no winner / loser distinction.

step.description: Name of the resolution step that broke the tie (e.g. `per-slice-authority-override`, `per-evidence-authority-override`, `default-authority-ordering`). Free-form string until the step taxonomy stabilises in v2.

override.description: Optional. The override map (per-slice or per-Evidence) consulted at this step — e.g. `{ criterion: identity-design-notes }`.

winner.description: Optional. Source key the step selected as the winner.

resolutionTrace.description: Optional trace describing how a non-trivial resolution selected the winning claim. Present only when `resolution` is `authority-resolved` or `per-slice-override`; absent otherwise.

id.description: Requirement id matching a `REQ-*` heading in `spec.md`.

status.description: Mirrors the `Status:` line on the matching `spec.md` requirement block.

sources.description: Source keys cited on the matching `spec.md` `Sources:` line. Empty array is legal when `status: unknown` and `resolution: unknown-no-evidence`.

contributing-claims.description: Every `(source, claim-id)` pair synthesis consulted, *not* only the winning one. Operators auditing a divergence can see what was dropped.

resolution.description: How synthesis arrived at the requirement's final value.
